entries.message: Set 028 initialized: drift-class hotfixes + harness hardening (3 sessions, $4.00 NTE)

Session 1: Fix fresh-set completedSessions[] schema. Modified ai_router/session_state.py to always emit completedSessions[], even on fresh sets. Updated 5 test files. Bump 0.3.1 → 0.3.2. All 40 pytest tests pass.

Session 2: Electron env allowlist refactor. Replaced blocklist (_ELECTRON_VAR_BLOCKLIST) with explicit allowlist (_ELECTRON_VAR_ALLOWLIST_*) in electronLaunch.ts. Future-proofs against new IDE IPC vars. All 5 Playwright tests pass. Bump 0.13.16 → 0.13.17.

Session 3: GitHub Actions CI matrix. Added .github/workflows/test.yml with pytest + Playwright on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest. xvfb-run on Linux for headless rendering. Layer 2 intentionally skipped (known Windows breakage). Updated CLAUDE.md with CI section. Set 028 ready for close-out.
